author: driver--build-ferrum-phase-0-coordinator
content: Plan: Agent 1a implements ferrum-core types layer per .design/ferrum-core.md. Scope: REQ-1 through REQ-8 (NdArray, ownership model, Element/DType), REQ-27-28 (errors), REQ-29-30 (buffer/DynArray), REQ-35-36 (introspection), REQ-37-38 (iterators), REQ-39 (Display). Files: ferrum-core/src/{lib.rs, error.rs, layout.rs, constants.rs, buffer.rs, dynarray.rs, record.rs, prelude.rs, array/*, dimension/*, dtype/*}. Agent must NOT implement indexing (1b), creation/manipulation (1c), or macros (1d).
